//: agentic-loop substrate registration. Merge the `hooks` block below into your repo's .claude/settings.json (create the file if absent; deep-merge the arrays if it exists). These make the loop's gates deterministic and its context-hygiene/auto-resume safety nets fire. Each agentic-loop hook no-ops outside loop context, so registering them is safe for normal work. NOT included here (repo-policy / opt-in — see SETUP.md): block-ts-violations.sh (language-specific), force-agentic-loop.sh (CI-only, forces the skill on a pinned branch), and the block-env-reads/block-destructive-git/block-secret-exfil security hooks.
